Author: goat, maintained by Franze, edited by ShiftyKiwi
Name: KiwiRichPresence
Description: Forked and expanded Discord Rich Presence for FFXIV with templates, job/context presets, custom images, privacy controls, and live preview tools.
Punchline: Customizable Discord Rich Presence for FFXIV
Changelog: Fork release as KiwiRichPresence. Preserves the original FFXIV Discord Rich Presence core while adding global, context, and job-based overrides, custom large/small artwork, hover text, privacy controls, live preview, manual apply/testing, and the latest stabilization pass for throttled refreshes and Wine bridge ownership.
